=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
Bob Dylan, 8/17/03, Careerbuilder.com Oakdale Theater, Wallingford, Connecticut


Great recording, received in a trade as a Shasta rec. probably is derived from LB1121

Disc 1: 

01. Stuck Inside of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again
02. Lay, Lady, Lay
03. Tweedle Dee & Tweedle Dum
04. I'll Be Your Baby Tonight
05. Things Have Changed
06. Highway 61 Revisited
07. This Wheel's On Fire
08. Watching The River Flow
09. The Wicked Messenger
10. Born In Time
11. A Hard Rain's A-Gonna Fall

Disc 2:

01. Honest With Me
02. Simple Twist Of Fate
03. band intro
04. Summer Days
05. Like A Rolling Stone
06. All Along The Watchtower
